body.title: Igor checks inertia before any file write
body.result: MEDIUM inertia branch added to scope_guard — posts warning to CC channel with rationale; tests pass
body.description: D317: before writing any file, Igor queries memory for inertia level of that path (brainstem/=HIGH, cognition/=MEDIUM, tools/=LOW etc). Logs rationale to forensic log. For MEDIUM: requires rationale in basket. For HIGH: SCOPE_GUARD already blocks, but also post to CC. Internalizes CLAUDE.md conventions as live habits, not just static rules.
